title: sorbus humifusa
intro: Sorbus humifusa, also known as foamy berry or downy serviceberry, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of salicylic acid. The health benefits of Sorbus humifusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Sorbus humifusa can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
